text: Could you repeat that, please?
I am not sure I understand. Could you explain?
Could you speak more slowly, please?
I am not sure how to say this in English.
Thank you for your patience.
Abroad
Adventure
Sightseeing
Culture
Foreign
Memorable
Destination
Landmark

Daniel says he is going to Barcelona. He asks: have you ever been to Spain? Aline answers: she has visited Portugal. She tells the story of her most memorable trip. Daniel feels ready for his first adventure.
Have you ever been abroad?
Yes, I have. I have visited Portugal.
I have never tried Spanish food.
When did you go?
It was the most memorable trip of my life.
When did you go? In 2023.
We went sightseeing in Buenos Aires.
I have never traveled alone.
We are going to start Project Aurora next month.
I will lead the planning meetings.
Yes, I have. I have visited Argentina twice.

Hi Aline, it is Daniel. Big news: I am going to Barcelona next month, for the global offsite! It is my first trip abroad — I have never traveled to another country, and I am a little nervous. You have traveled a lot, right? Can we have lunch this week? I want to hear your travel stories. Thank you!

Have I ever been abroad? Yes, I have — I have visited Argentina and Mexico. Have I ever traveled alone? No, I have never traveled alone, always with family or friends. Have I ever tried a foreign food and loved it? Yes! Mexican tacos, amazing. Have I ever visited a famous landmark? Yes, the pyramids near Mexico City. And my most memorable trip? Mexico City, for sure — the culture and the food. I will never forget it.
Aline, I am going to Barcelona next month — my first foreign trip! Have you ever been to Spain?
No, I have never been to Spain. But I have visited Portugal — the culture is amazing.
Nice! When did you go?
In 2022, for a project meeting. We went sightseeing in Lisbon after the work.
I have never traveled abroad. I am nervous! Have you ever traveled alone?
Yes, I have. It was a real adventure — and the most memorable trip of my life.
Really? Where did you go?
To Buenos Aires. I visited every landmark in the city — alone and happy!
Amazing. And have you ever tried Spanish tapas?
I have never tried them. You have to tell me everything after the trip!
Deal! And thank you — now I feel ready for my first adventure.
You will love it. Barcelona is a beautiful destination!
